aeronautics_addon.ponder.gravitite.text_: One Gravitite cancels gravity for the whole assembled ship.
It holds the hull neutral, so thrust and ballast still decide motion.
Redstone sets strength: 0 turns it off, 15 gives full gravity cancel.
With no signal, the ship starts to fall again.
Power it again to return to zero-gravity flight.
aeronautics_addon.ponder.stabilite.text_: Stabilite levels roll and pitch while normal movement still works.
It nudges the ship back toward the horizon instead of freezing yaw.
Redstone sets rigidity: low signal is gentle, and 15 snaps back hard.
Mount a Steering Wheel on top to add yaw control. This ignores Stabilite redstone.
Right-click the wheel, steer with A and D, then press Shift to step away.
